description.value: Your defensive ink spray has developed the capacity to cause haunting hallucinations. A creature sprayed with your ink must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] saving throw against either your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. On a failure, the creature also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure).
